nodes.label: AI as tool for lesson planning
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole decision-maker for lesson content
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help with lesson planning and coming up with creative ways to engage students

nodes.label: AI alignment with educational standards and rigor
nodes.label_negative: AI suggestions that deviate from required standards
nodes.grounding_span: my standards as a teacher are set in stone by the county

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.label_negative: One-shot AI output without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I will give the parameters upfront and see what it comes up with, but usually I will also think of other ideas that are related to the AI answer and then collaborate to work out the details

nodes.label: AI as workload reducer for repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to teacher role
nodes.grounding_span: AI can help take some of the load off of teachers, because right now the teacher workload is pretty heavy

nodes.label: Student engagement and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I wanted some independent stations that students could do while I am working with different groups

nodes.label: Compliance with educational standards
nodes.grounding_span: if they don't line up with the standard, I may not be able to use them

nodes.label: Teacher well-being and manageable workload
nodes.grounding_span: AI can help take some of the load off of teachers

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: any help coming up with ideas to use with kids is beneficial and I am usually satisfied

nodes.label: Skepticism about AI replacing teachers
nodes.grounding_span: I don't think AI will take over classroom teaching

nodes.label: Comfort with AI as helper
nodes.grounding_span: I am getting more comfortable using it as a tool

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: I will also think of other ideas that are related to the AI answer and then collaborate to work out the details

nodes.label: Standards-driven constraint framing — defines fixed parameters before seeking AI input
nodes.grounding_span: I usually have to set the standard that I am working on, and ask the AI to give ideas that would fit the standard
